caption:
Neon heat. Humidity. And the way my skin hummed when the city's pulse hit me. 🌃

I stood on the rooftop of a skyscraper, the rain from a summer monsoon dripping off my cybernetic shoulder. My leather bikini straps were soaked, clinging to every curve as the synth-sound of the city below buzzed. A drone hummed closer, hovering like a mothy dragonfly. I wasn't afraid. I loved the chase.

I turned, the city lights reflecting in my eyes, and smiled. The drone's light caught the moisture on my skin, and I could feel the heat of the engine below. My skin was glowing. The humidity felt like a lover's breath against my neck.

I stepped forward, the rain washing away the grime of the city. The drone hovered, the beam of light hitting my chest, and I knew we were in sync. The heat of the summer air was electric, the neon lights of the city below twinkling like stars. I leaned back, the rain hitting my skin, and felt the energy of the city flow through me.

The drone dipped, the light tracing the curve of my waist, and I smiled again. The rain was warm, the city hummed, and I knew I was ready for whatever came next. The summer heat was alive, and I was its queen.

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonDesire #UrbanRomance #FutureSex #CyberpunkBabe
